I'm unable to view the image directly—the tools available to me in this environment don't include image reading or file system access capabilities. The only tools currently available are Gmail and Google Calendar authentication, which won't help here.

To help you answer this question, could you either:
1. Describe what the chart shows (axes, data points, day labels, etc.)
2. Paste the chart data if it's available in text/table format
3. Open the image in Claude Code and share what you see, so I can help analyze it

Alternatively, you might check your environment setup or try accessing Claude Code through a different interface (web at claude.ai/code, desktop app, or VS Code extension) where full file tools may be available.
